# yandex_cdn_raw_log (Resource)

Allows management of a Yandex.Cloud CDN Raw Log configuration. Raw logs provide access to detailed CDN access logs that are stored in Object Storage.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `resource_id` (String) CDN resource ID for which raw logs are configured

### Optional

- `settings` (Block, Optional) Raw logs settings configuration (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--settings))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the CDN Raw Log configuration
- `status` (String) The status of the raw logs configuration (ACTIVE, NOT_ACTIVATED, SUSPENDED)

<a id="nestedblock--settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `settings`

Required:

- `bucket_name` (String) Object Storage bucket name where logs will be stored

Optional:

- `bucket_region` (String) Object Storage bucket region (default: ru-central1)
- `file_prefix` (String) Prefix for log files in the bucket
